message.content: Always use Redis here if we hit scaling limits.
That is just a possibility, not a standing rule.
Remember that staging uses a separate Stripe account.
Noted. I will keep staging and production billing separate.
Never deploy on Friday night unless we have rollback coverage.
For this repo, always ask before changing billing-related environment variables.
Understood. I'll ask before changing billing-related environment variables.
Working on the billing rollout notes now.
